title: Lisbon Traffic Interdictions
author: Câmara Municipal de Lisboa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
CSV files describing traffic restrictions, road closures, and street conditioning events within the municipality of Lisbon. 
 Data Structure (Columns): 
 
  entity_id : Unique restriction identifier (usually from EMEL). 
  impacto : Traffic impact severity (e.g., Relevante). 
  restricao_circulacao : Type of restriction (e.g., Lane narrowing, Full closure). 
  morada : Affected street name. 
  periodos_condicionamentos : Timeframes of the restriction (start/end dates and daily times). 
  motivo : Reason for closure (e.g., Roadworks). 
  position : GeoJSON coordinates of the affected area. 
  creation_date : Timestamp when the record was created.
